next_step.current_state: Pre-submit check: Task asks amount earned via service line "operator workflow discovery sprint" from January 2026 onward. Arithmetic explicit: 650 = 650.
next_step.observation: Read all 4 matching invoice files; only INV-0004 (2026-01-17) qualifies for since January 2026 with matching line_eur 650.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant schema, read nested finance AGENTS files, and used exact line-item matching with auditable arithmetic.
function.outcome_justification: Exact search for line item "operator workflow discovery sprint" in 50_finance/invoices returned 4 matches. After reading all 4 invoices, only 2026-01-17 (INV-0004) is on/after January 2026; its matching line_eur is 650, so total earned since January 2026 is 650.
